A blue die is a six-sided cube (or rectangular prism), and none of the described openings (star-shaped, square, or round) would accommodate a standard six-sided die. The die would not fit through any of these openings.

meta.system: Answer the puzzle with EXACTLY one of: star | square | round | none.
